fill_to_balance90.reason: Local historical candidate-pipeline positives did not transfer to same-host no-order shadows; same-window source fields are insufficient.

portfolio_ledger_diagnostic_3600s_shadow.reason: Live/no-order residual risk was broad and retrospective positive-only filtering destroyed sample.

dynamic_condition_ledger_risk_state_gate.reason: Online gate blocked 65208 risk-increasing seeds but only improved residual_qty_rate 1.2097% to 1.2013%, worsened residual_cost_rate 0.9470% to 0.9799%, and reduced fee/stress materially.

selected_next_spec.name: default_off_source_link_transition_event_lite_summary
selected_next_spec.purpose: Expose enough per-candidate transition linkage to explain why historical candidate-pipeline mechanisms fail to transfer to same-window no-order summaries without pulling events JSONL.
selected_next_spec.default_behavior: No existing single-profile, multi-profile, event-lite, pair-source, portfolio-ledger, late-repair-only, fill-to-balance, or diagnostic summary shape changes when the new flag is unset.
required_summary_fields: candidate transition counts by condition/slug/day/side/offset bucket
admission/block reason buckets with source quote_intent_id/source_order_id presence counts
online condition ledger proxy before and after seed buckets
queue_supported_fill and queue_credit proxy buckets when available
residual source-link buckets from admitted seed to final residual side/cost bucket
aggregate parity totals matching per-summary totals
selected_next_spec.why_not_a_trading_mechanism: This is diagnostic source linkage only. It does not block, size, price, route, order, cancel, redeem, or modify runner trading behavior.
why_compliant: It is not a public/source price cap.
It is not a static target/cap sweep.
It is not residual cooldown/admission cap.
It is not activation window widening.

already_available_in_runner_state: virtual inventory lots by side before and after seed
pair source records from existing pair-source event-lite path

pass_fail_criteria.KEEP: Implementability review produces a default-off source-link transition diagnostic, local smoke proves default path unchanged and enabled summaries link admitted/blocked candidates to pair/residual transitions with aggregate parity.
pass_fail_criteria.UNKNOWN: Runner state cannot expose required transition links without events JSONL or same-window source fields; exact missing fields are named.
pass_fail_criteria.DISCARD: The diagnostic can only be built by changing trading behavior, pulling events JSONL, or adding summary-only filters that destroy sample.
pass_fail_criteria.BLOCKED: Local runner/tests/artifacts are missing or corrupt.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_DYNAMIC_RISK_STATE_FREEZE_AND_SOURCE_LINK_TRANSITION_SPEC_SELECTED
research_ranking.interpretation: The prior dynamic risk-state gate remains mixed and should not proceed to shadow. The selected next step is concrete local instrumentation that can answer transfer-gap questions before more mechanism search.

next_executable_action: Implementability_review only: add default-off source-link transition event-lite diagnostics to tools/xuan_dplus_passive_passive_shadow_runner.py plus a local no-network smoke; do not SSH or start EC2 shadow/canary.
